title: Realistic Fishing
body:
## (More) Realistic Fishing
### Instead of items, reel in live fish from the water!

Small datapack changing the fishing mechanic. **When a fish is caught, you reel in a live fish instead of a dead one in item form.**

---
Demonstration video:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/3CTi8l9dECw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

**Features:**
- Fish items are replaced with living entities when fished
- Configurable velocity of the spawned living fish entities
  - Stored in `/data get storage real_fishing:config motion_scale`
  - The velocity of the spawned fish entity is multiplied by these values, with the velocity of the original item entity as the base value
  - Tweak this if you feel like the fish you reel in are either
    - Absolutely flying out of the water
    - Barely making it above the water surface
  - See `/data get storage real_fishing:config motion_scale_default` for defaults

---

**Credits:**
- [Realistic Fishing Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/fishing) for the idea
